business_question: Which regions are most vulnerable to inventory stockouts during peak demand periods?
business_context: Supply chain teams need to proactively allocate inventory before high-demand periods.
sql_answer:
SELECT
st.REGION,
COUNT(se.STOCKOUT_KEY) AS STOCKOUT_EVENTS,
SUM(se.LOST_UNITS_ESTIMATED) AS LOST_UNITS
FROM FACT_STOCKOUT_EVENT se
JOIN DIM_STORE st
ON se.STORE_KEY = st.STORE_KEY
GROUP BY st.REGION
ORDER BY LOST_UNITS DESC;
